metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 8 mins
2 Wall Walks
10 Russian Kettlebell Swings @ 24/16kg
5 Pull Ups
10 Wall Balls

hypertrophy.reasoning: Build posterior chain balance and arm hypertrophy while sparing lower body and pressing muscles from today's heavy squat/press and metcon demands.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 6 at 70 percent. Strength: Shoulder Press, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 8 minutes: 2 Wall Walks, 10 Russian Kettlebell Swings @ 24/16kg, 5 Pull Ups, 10 Wall Balls. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
